records.m_SubTitle_ENG: The Empire of Arcadena. <color=#ffd34c>Monte</color>, a mountain village in the southern continent.
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: The Empire of Arcadena. <color=#ffd34c>Monte</color>, a mountain village in the southern continent.
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: The Empire of Arcadena. <color=#ffd34c>Monte</color>, a mountain village in the southern continent.

records.m_SubTitle_ENG: Knights of Redemption. <color=#ffd34c>One day before</color> departure.
records.m_SubTitle_DEU: Knights of Redemption. <color=#ffd34c>One day before</color> departure.
records.m_SubTitle_FRA: Knights of Redemption. <color=#ffd34c>One day before</color> departure.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your Highness, may I have a moment to talk to you?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your Highness, may I have a moment to talk to you?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your Highness, may I have a moment to talk to you?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You may. What is it, Sir Allen?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You may. What is it, Sir Allen?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You may. What is it, Sir Allen?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We lost contact with the advance party that left for Monte.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We lost contact with the advance party that left for Monte.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We lost contact with the advance party that left for Monte.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The village is on the top of a mountain, which makes it difficult to receive supplies, but the mass of the monsters seems to be greater than expected.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The village is on the top of a mountain, which makes it difficult to receive supplies, but the mass of the monsters seems to be greater than expected.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The village is on the top of a mountain, which makes it difficult to receive supplies, but the mass of the monsters seems to be greater than expected.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even holding out seems tough for an ordinary army surrounded by forests.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even holding out seems tough for an ordinary army surrounded by forests.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even holding out seems tough for an ordinary army surrounded by forests.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's the number of soldiers that can participate in battle now?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's the number of soldiers that can participate in battle now?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's the number of soldiers that can participate in battle now?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Most are injured from recurring combat.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Most are injured from recurring combat.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Most are injured from recurring combat.

records.m_Talk_ENG: An arduous march is ahead of us, which means there will be fewer soldiers that will be available.
records.m_Talk_DEU: An arduous march is ahead of us, which means there will be fewer soldiers that will be available.
records.m_Talk_FRA: An arduous march is ahead of us, which means there will be fewer soldiers that will be available.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Not to mention the banquet will be held soon. It will be bad for morale if we lose more people at a time like this.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Not to mention the banquet will be held soon. It will be bad for morale if we lose more people at a time like this.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Not to mention the banquet will be held soon. It will be bad for morale if we lose more people at a time like this.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So we need a few good men to advance...
records.m_Talk_DEU: So we need a few good men to advance...
records.m_Talk_FRA: So we need a few good men to advance...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Allen. Call for Lucrecia and Carlota. I'll take them and the peasant to go forth.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Allen. Call for Lucrecia and Carlota. I'll take them and the peasant to go forth.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Allen. Call for Lucrecia and Carlota. I'll take them and the peasant to go forth.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'll leave you in charge while I am absent.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'll leave you in charge while I am absent.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'll leave you in charge while I am absent.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is no need for you to go yourself, Your Highness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is no need for you to go yourself, Your Highness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is no need for you to go yourself, Your Highness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Give the orders, and I shall take some soldiers to take care of the matter.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Give the orders, and I shall take some soldiers to take care of the matter.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Give the orders, and I shall take some soldiers to take care of the matter.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A ruler must set an example for his subjects. As the crown prince of the Empire, I cannot sit idle while the soldiers offer their lives to our cause.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A ruler must set an example for his subjects. As the crown prince of the Empire, I cannot sit idle while the soldiers offer their lives to our cause.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A ruler must set an example for his subjects. As the crown prince of the Empire, I cannot sit idle while the soldiers offer their lives to our cause.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We do not have much time until the banquet, so I shall make haste.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We do not have much time until the banquet, so I shall make haste.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We do not have much time until the banquet, so I shall make haste.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You wish to enter a perilous area, where the advance party might have been wiped out, with just four people?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You wish to enter a perilous area, where the advance party might have been wiped out, with just four people?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You wish to enter a perilous area, where the advance party might have been wiped out, with just four people?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Very self-assured, Your Highness.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Very self-assured, Your Highness.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Very self-assured, Your Highness.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We won't be enough to fight the monsters, much less take care of the injured villagers.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We won't be enough to fight the monsters, much less take care of the injured villagers.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We won't be enough to fight the monsters, much less take care of the injured villagers.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is no need for us to move when there are other soldiers available.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is no need for us to move when there are other soldiers available.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is no need for us to move when there are other soldiers available.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Your assumption of our loss makes it clear you're a former slave.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Your assumption of our loss makes it clear you're a former slave.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Your assumption of our loss makes it clear you're a former slave.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I shall not fault you for your ignorance, as it is in your blood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I shall not fault you for your ignorance, as it is in your blood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I shall not fault you for your ignorance, as it is in your blood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You need not lift a finger for this matter to be handled, Your Highness. The Savior and I should suffice.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You need not lift a finger for this matter to be handled, Your Highness. The Savior and I should suffice.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You need not lift a finger for this matter to be handled, Your Highness. The Savior and I should suffice.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am sure that might be fine for you, Carlota. But I'm just being realistic.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am sure that might be fine for you, Carlota. But I'm just being realistic.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am sure that might be fine for you, Carlota. But I'm just being realistic.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There is no need to take any unnecessary risks.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There is no need to take any unnecessary risks.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There is no need to take any unnecessary risks.

records.m_Talk_ENG:

8vWell, Lucrecia.
records.m_Talk_DEU:

8vWell, Lucrecia.
records.m_Talk_FRA:

8vWell, Lucrecia.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It's just my assumption, but I think the others are still alive.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It's just my assumption, but I think the others are still alive.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It's just my assumption, but I think the others are still alive.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The others... are alive? But.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The others... are alive? But.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The others... are alive? But.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ha ha! It seems like you're growing into your uniform, even though you're far from living up to Sir Allen's reputation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ha ha! It seems like you're growing into your uniform, even though you're far from living up to Sir Allen's reputation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ha ha! It seems like you're growing into your uniform, even though you're far from living up to Sir Allen's reputation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now, let me ask you a question.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now, let me ask you a question.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now, let me ask you a question.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What do you think is the easiest method to lure a beast?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What do you think is the easiest method to lure a beast?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What do you think is the easiest method to lure a beast?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Play... dead?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Play... dead?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Play... dead?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop looking at me like that. I know that's not the answer.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop looking at me like that. I know that's not the answer.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop looking at me like that. I know that's not the answer.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The correct answer is, tricking the beast into thinking that it's a predator.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The correct answer is, tricking the beast into thinking that it's a predator.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The correct answer is, tricking the beast into thinking that it's a predator.

records.m_Talk_ENG: There's no easier prey than a beast that's fixating on its food.
records.m_Talk_DEU: There's no easier prey than a beast that's fixating on its food.
records.m_Talk_FRA: There's no easier prey than a beast that's fixating on its food.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Fixated on its food...? Do you mean to lure the monsters toward the village?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Fixated on its food...? Do you mean to lure the monsters toward the village?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Fixated on its food...? Do you mean to lure the monsters toward the village?

records.m_Talk_ENG: They will be gathering there without our intervention.
records.m_Talk_DEU: They will be gathering there without our intervention.
records.m_Talk_FRA: They will be gathering there without our intervention.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Alas, our allies are in a dire situation where they are unable to leave the village.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Alas, our allies are in a dire situation where they are unable to leave the village.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Alas, our allies are in a dire situation where they are unable to leave the village.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Which is why you want a small group.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Which is why you want a small group.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Which is why you want a small group.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Because a big army would alert the monsters and make them flee.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Because a big army would alert the monsters and make them flee.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Because a big army would alert the monsters and make them flee.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Indeed. It would save us the trouble of finding all the monsters in the expansive mountain areas.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Indeed. It would save us the trouble of finding all the monsters in the expansive mountain areas.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Indeed. It would save us the trouble of finding all the monsters in the expansive mountain areas.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The plan is simple.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The plan is simple.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The plan is simple.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We four will focus fire from four different directions and make a way for the advance party to escape the village.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We four will focus fire from four different directions and make a way for the advance party to escape the village.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We four will focus fire from four different directions and make a way for the advance party to escape the village.

records.m_Talk_ENG: When the soldiers make it out, we combine forces with them to surround the monsters.
records.m_Talk_DEU: When the soldiers make it out, we combine forces with them to surround the monsters.
records.m_Talk_FRA: When the soldiers make it out, we combine forces with them to surround the monsters.

records.m_Talk_ENG: From there on, we eliminate all the monsters together.
records.m_Talk_DEU: From there on, we eliminate all the monsters together.
records.m_Talk_FRA: From there on, we eliminate all the monsters together.

records.m_Talk_ENG: The plan itself is simple, but there is still the underlying possibility that the advance party has been decimated.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The plan itself is simple, but there is still the underlying possibility that the advance party has been decimated.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The plan itself is simple, but there is still the underlying possibility that the advance party has been decimated.

records.m_Talk_ENG: If the advance party was decimated, no villager would have survived afterward.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If the advance party was decimated, no villager would have survived afterward.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If the advance party was decimated, no villager would have survived afterward.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Which would also invalidate the purpose of this expedition.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Which would also invalidate the purpose of this expedition.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Which would also invalidate the purpose of this expedition.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Understood. Should we start right away?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Understood. Should we start right away?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Understood. Should we start right away?

records.m_Talk_ENG: The sooner, the better. We cannot have those monsters run amok forever.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The sooner, the better. We cannot have those monsters run amok forever.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The sooner, the better. We cannot have those monsters run amok forever.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Now then, it is time we show those insolent monsters whose territory they are causing trouble on!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Now then, it is time we show those insolent monsters whose territory they are causing trouble on!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Now then, it is time we show those insolent monsters whose territory they are causing trouble on!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stand proud beneath the flag of redemption.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stand proud beneath the flag of redemption.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stand proud beneath the flag of redemption.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Knights of Redemption, march forward!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Knights of Redemption, march forward!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Knights of Redemption, march forward!

root.m_Talk_FRA: From there on, we eliminate all the monsters together.

root.m_Talk_ENG: The plan itself is simple, but there is still the underlying possibility that the advance party has been decimated.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The plan itself is simple, but there is still the underlying possibility that the advance party has been decimated.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The plan itself is simple, but there is still the underlying possibility that the advance party has been decimated.

root.m_Talk_ENG: If the advance party was decimated, no villager would have survived afterward.
root.m_Talk_DEU: If the advance party was decimated, no villager would have survived afterward.
root.m_Talk_FRA: If the advance party was decimated, no villager would have survived afterward.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Which would also invalidate the purpose of this expedition.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Which would also invalidate the purpose of this expedition.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Which would also invalidate the purpose of this expedition.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Understood. Should we start right away?
root.m_Talk_DEU: Understood. Should we start right away?
root.m_Talk_FRA: Understood. Should we start right away?

root.m_Talk_ENG: The sooner, the better. We cannot have those monsters run amok forever.
root.m_Talk_DEU: The sooner, the better. We cannot have those monsters run amok forever.
root.m_Talk_FRA: The sooner, the better. We cannot have those monsters run amok forever.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Now then, it is time we show those insolent monsters whose territory they are causing trouble on!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Now then, it is time we show those insolent monsters whose territory they are causing trouble on!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Now then, it is time we show those insolent monsters whose territory they are causing trouble on!

root.m_Talk_ENG: Stand proud beneath the flag of redemption.
root.m_Talk_DEU: Stand proud beneath the flag of redemption.
root.m_Talk_FRA: Stand proud beneath the flag of redemption.

root.m_Talk_ENG: Knights of Redemption, march forward!
root.m_Talk_DEU: Knights of Redemption, march forward!
root.m_Talk_FRA: Knights of Redemption, march forward!
